mapper.sql: id, user_id, word_text, phonetic, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentence, example_translation, audio_url, note, tags, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_word ( user_id, word_text, phonetic, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentence, example_translation, audio_url, note, tags, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{wordText}, #{phonetic}, #{partOfSpeech}, #{definition}, #{exampleSentence}, #{exampleTranslation}, #{audioUrl}, #{note}, #{tags}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM user_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM user_word WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND word_text LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_word ( user_id, word_text, phonetic, part_of_speech, definition, example_sentence, example_translation, audio_url, note, tags, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.userId}, #{item.wordText}, #{item.phonetic}, #{item.partOfSpeech}, #{item.definition}, #{item.exampleSentence}, #{item.exampleTranslation}, #{item.audioUrl}, #{item.note}, #{item.tags}, NOW(), NOW() )
